violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Uncovered tortilla next to hand washing sink.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Company policy is to discard food after 2 hour holding. There is no stickers, logs to support that information.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Fans in walk in cooler had dust build up hanging down.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Pepsi machine ice chute has black/green build up inside the chute.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
